description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and publish. In the build stage add jobs named build:centos6, build:centos7, build:debian10buster, build:debian8jessie, build:debian9stretch, build:fedora25, build:fedora26, build:fedora27, build:macos, build:ubuntu14.04trusty, build:ubuntu16.04xenial, build:ubuntu17.04zesty, and build:ubuntu17.10artful; each job uses the indicated harbottle/omnibus Docker image (or the default centos image for macos), runs the script commands exactly as listed (e.g., "bundle install", "eval \"$(rbenv init -)\"; bundle install" for Debian jobs, "bundle exec omnibus build bolt", "mkdir -p packages/<distro>", "cp -f pkg/*.rpm packages/<distro>" or "cp -f pkg/*.deb packages/<distro>" or "cp -f pkg/*.pkg packages/<distro>", and for macos also "sudo bundle exec omnibus build bolt", "sudo rm -rf pkg"), and publishes the "packages" directory as an artifact. The macos job runs on a runner tagged "mac" and sets the variable GIT_STRATEGY=clone. Finally, add a publish:artifacts job in the publish stage that uses the centos image, runs "ls -lR packages", and also uploads the "packages" directory as an artifact.
